basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Positions Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Project Positions Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 6 Project Positions posts. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the TISS Project Positions Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in social sciences or law
qualification.details: Program Coordinator: Master’s degree in social sciences or law with adequate knowledge of forest and land rights, forest laws, policy, and institutions, and community engagement work. Ability to analyse and document policy, case laws and field insights. Conduct field work in rural areas independently. Ability to coordinate with government and civil society groups in Maharashtra, and organise training and capacity building programs independently. Basic skills in Excel, SPSS, GPS and GIS. Must be speaking and writing in Marathi. District-cum-Research Coordinators: Master’s degree in social sciences or law with adequate knowledge on forest rights act, forest laws, policy, and institutions, and a minimum of two years of rural field experience. Ability to coordinate with government and civil society groups at the district and local levels in Maharashtra, and organise training and capacity building programs on forest rights and policies for government officers and Gram Sabha members independently. Conduct field work in rural areas independently, and have the ability to mentor village coordinators. Good at analysis, documentation on policy, case laws, write case studies from field insights. Basic skills in Excel, SPSS, GPS and GIS. Must be speaking and writing Marathi.

salary_details.details: Program Coordinator: Rs. 50000 - Rs. 60000 Consolidated District-cum-Research Coordinators: Rs. 50000 - Rs. 60000 Consolidated

selection_process: Shortlisting based on CV Personal/Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 13 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Project Positions, including Program Coordinator and District-cum-Research Coordinators.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in social sciences or law to be eligible for these positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for these positions ranges from Rs. 50000 to Rs. 60000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply via email by sending their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates based on their CV, followed by a Personal or Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Key dates include the notification date (26 April 2026), last date of application (13 May 2026), interview (18 May 2026), and joining date (01 June 2026).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis, with the project expected to end on 31 May 2027.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
